examples: Studies suggest that the Gambian pouched rat can do better.
It's no surprise that a Gambian man will refer to his wife as "boss lady".
In Africa, human infections have been documented through the handling of infected monkeys, Gambian rats or squirrels.
The Netherlands were lucky to hang on as the Gambian opponents laid siege to their goal late in the game.
The Gambian economy is still very much a work in progress, with much of the government's efforts spent on reducing poverty.
